title: Rollins (ROL) Upgraded to Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
text: Rollins (ROL) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy).

title: Bet on These 5 Low-Leverage Stocks Amid Persistent Inflation
text: A prudent investor knows that even if there is market volatility, choosing low-leverage stocks can protect one from huge losses in times of crisis. You may buy ROl, ALK, LIN, SKY and STT

title: Rollins (ROL) Q4 Earnings Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
text: Rollins' (ROL) fourth-quarter 2022 revenues increase year over year.

title: Rollins, Inc. (ROL) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Rollins, Inc. (NYSE:ROL ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 16, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Joe Calabrese - Investor Relations John Wilson - Vice Chairman Julie Bimmerman - Group Vice President, Finance & Investor Relations Jerry Gahlhoff - President & Chief Executive Officer Kenneth Krause - Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer & Treasurer Conference Call Participants Tim Mulrooney - William Blair Ashish Sabadra - RBC Capital Markets Hans Hoffman - Jefferies Oliver Davies - Redburn Brian Butler - Stifel Operator Greetings, and welcome to the Rollins Inc. Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Rollins (ROL) Tops Q4 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Rollins (ROL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 6.25% and 0.58%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: 4 Factor Dividend Growth Portfolio - January 2023 Update
text: The 4 factor dividend growth portfolio was launched on November 1st, 2022, and is thus far off to a great start. The portfolio lost by 11 bps to the S&P 500 Total Return during the month of January.

title: Rollins (ROL) to Announce Q4 Earnings. What to Expect?
text: Rollins (ROL) banks on increased commercial and residential business growth but is unlikely to beat estimates.

title: My Top 15 High-Growth Dividend Stocks For February 2023
text: I present my top 15 high-growth dividend stocks to consider during the month of February. The watchlist posted a gain of 9.44% in January and starts the new year on a positive note.
